title: ricinocarpus californicus
intro: Ricinocarpus californicus, also known as California buckwheat, is a plant species native to California and other parts of North America. The plant is known for its edible seeds, which have been used as a nutritional supplement due to their high protein and fiber content. Ricinocarpus californicus has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant benefits. The plant can be prepared as a tea, flour, or supplement, and is often used in herbal preparations for its potential health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health.
